title: CreaTRIM
body:
# CreaTRIM

### Why this modpack?
This modpack aim to create the perfect vanilla experience, with mods like Create, YUNG's Better and other utilites/performace mod (See the [versions tab](https://modrinth.com/modpack/creatrim/versions) to check all the mod included).

### Why someone should want to download CreaTRIM?
This modpack has been created for TRIM members, obviously all user can use it, but is not created for public uses in mind.

### Update information
The pack will be keep up to date at the latest version of mods and loader, i hope to update it to latest version of minecraft too.
